headlines.summary: The clip of a pole on a gate threw Team USA star Breezy Johnson off course during the Super-G event in Italy, taking her out of contention....

headlines.title: Russia to suspend flights to Cuba as Trump sanctions cut fuel supply
headlines.summary: Russia's Federal Air Transport Agency said the airlines Rossiya and Nordwind were forced to adjust their flight programs due to problems securing fuel in Cuba....
